---
title: "Subscribe"
---

I write about end-to-end ML products/services like RecSys. I'm also learning to become a better builder everyday, and I will share my learnings here.

Drop your email and I'll send you a note when something new goes up.

<div class="newsletter-form" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <input
    type="email"
    id="sub-email"
    placeholder="you@example.com"
    style="padding: 0.45rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.95rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; width: 260px; max-width: 100%;"
  />
  <button
    onclick="doSubscribe()"
    id="sub-btn"
    style="margin-left: 0.5rem; padding: 0.45rem 1rem; font-size: 0.95rem; background: #0057a3; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;"
  >
    Subscribe
  </button>
  <p id="sub-msg" style="margin-top: 0.6rem; min-height: 1.2em; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555;"></p>
</div>

<script>
const SUBSCRIBE_URL = "https://olssvguaeagsmkfmsvvo.supabase.co/functions/v1/subscribe";

async function doSubscribe() {
  const emailEl = document.getElementById("sub-email");
  const msgEl   = document.getElementById("sub-msg");
  const btn     = document.getElementById("sub-btn");
  const email   = emailEl.value.trim();
  if (!email) { msgEl.textContent = "Please enter your email."; return; }
  btn.disabled = true;
  msgEl.textContent = "Subscribing…";
  try {
    const res  = await fetch(SUBSCRIBE_URL, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ email }),
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.ok) {
      msgEl.textContent = "Done! You're subscribed.";
      emailEl.value = "";
    } else {
      msgEl.textContent = data.error || "Something went wrong. Please try again.";
      btn.disabled = false;
    }
  } catch {
    msgEl.textContent = "Network error. Please try again.";
    btn.disabled = false;
  }
}
</script>
